positive: A minimalistic, abstract geometric composition featuring interconnected constellations and celestial bodies, rendered in a neo-art deco style. The central focus is a glowing, stylized crescent moon intertwined with sharp, angular stars and deep blue nebulae. Use a limited palette of midnight indigo, metallic gold, and crisp white. The design must have strong, clean silhouettes suitable for screen printing on fabric, maintaining high contrast and a central composition. The style should evoke a sense of mystical elegance and modern wonder. Intricate line work, sharp focus, vector quality.
negative: blurry, noisy, lowres, artifacts, watermark, logo, text, signature, grainy, bad anatomy, dirty, grunge, photorealistic
